items.title: @Andrey__HQ My favorite question is: "Would you like $100,000 today, or a penny that doubles every d...
items.content:
@Andrey__HQ My favorite question is: "Would you like $100,000 today, or a penny that doubles every day for a month?" 

If you're starting an exponentially growing company, you definitely don't want to take the cash. Because when the exponents start flipping, the pile gets a lot bigger.

items.title:
Xenobiotic Intelligence

Bio-Cybernetic Hex Swarm: Panspermia and the Alien Cephalopod Theory

The C...
items.content:
Xenobiotic Intelligence

Bio-Cybernetic Hex Swarm: Panspermia and the Alien Cephalopod Theory

The Cambrian Singularity: Extraterrestrial Life and the Origin of Octopuses

This research paper explores the Cambrian Singularity, addressing the classic paradox of whether the chicken or the egg came first. The research paper suggests that octopuses could be aliens from space and not originated from the earth. This goes simply against the Darwinian evolution theory and suggests that life always existed in the universe and nothing ever has evolved on the earth or other exoplanets .

The paper simply takes you back to the bible. These brainy cephalopods might have originated off the solar system. It supports the Cambrian explosion thesis which suggests that, all the organisms on the earth make up the most modern animal life as an outcome of extraterrestrial viruses carried on a meteor that crashed onto Earth 540 million years ago.

The underlying theory is panspermia, that some viruses and bacteria travel on the tails of comets or meteors that may take root on exoplanets. These comets could have introduced Earth to novel life forms that evolved on other exoplanets, including viruses, durable microorganisms like unearthly tardigrades or, as the new study suggests, even fertilized animal eggs from other worlds.

The paper suggests that cryopreserved eggs of either squids or octopuses could have arrived in icy bodies several hundred million years ago from the other parts of the universe that already had preexisting life. Crazy as this may sound, but the authors of this paper have presented a lot of interesting evidence for other scientists to mull over. Beginning with the studies of the nucleus of comet Halley in 1980s, comets were carrying bacteria and viruses from external space.

Their skill at things like opening jars is legendary. You cannot possibly find that intelligence from any other form of animal life in the sea on the earth.  Dawkins has always criticized creationism and appearance of some sort of intelligent design, but If life on Earth today is the result of countless tiny changes over billions of years, a clear chain of fossils leading back to that original single-celled organism should be available in the fossil record. There should be billions of fossils documenting the transitions between billions of species throughout the record. However, this prediction has not been verified in the fossil record, effectively falsifying Darwinian Evolution. Also no theory of evolution explained the sudden appearance of few species on the earth scene without any form of transition of intermediate forms which is the fundamental essence of evolution. This was acknowledged by the famous evolutionary paleontologist of Harvard, Stephen J. Gould.

#BigData #Analytics #DataScience #AI #MachineLearning #IoT #IIoT #PyTorch #Python #RStats #TensorFlow #Java #JavaScript #ReactJS #GoLang #CloudComputing #Serverless #DataScientist #Linux #Programming #Coding #100DaysofCode

References

Abbott, A. (2015). Octopus genome holds clues to uncanny intelligence. Nature. https://t.co/A413A7FMDU

Budd, G. E., & Jensen, S. (2017). The origin of animals and a ‘Savannah’ hypothesis for early animal evolution. Biological Reviews, 92(1), 446-473. https://t.co/zXDKgw7Lek

Hoyle, F., & Wickramasinghe, N. C. (2012). A short history of panspermia from antiquity through the mid-1970s. Astrobiology, 12(6), 471-476. https://t.co/lqmrsPkWXW

Paterson, J. R., Edgecombe, G. D., García-Bellido, D. C., Jago, J. B., & Gehling, J. G. (2013). Complexity and diversity of eyes in Early Cambrian ecosystems. Scientific Reports, 3, 2751. https://t.co/1ycpEYDPqU

Peters, S. E., & Gaines, R. R. (2018). Formation of the Great Unconformity as a trigger for the Cambrian explosion. Nature, 554(7690), 363-366. https://t.co/sBcuY3QSL0

Rampelotto, P. H. (2010). Panspermia: A promising field of research. Astrobiology Science Conference 2010, 5224. https://t.co/BzxBTAwhRi

Steele, E. J., Gorczynski, R. M., Lindley, R. A., Liu, Y., Temple, R., Coghlan, J. P., … & Wickramasinghe, N. C. (2018). Cause of Cambrian Explosion – Terrestrial or Cosmic? Progress in Biophysics and Molecular Biology, 136, 3-23. https://t.co/H0qBHOdTuV

Wainwright, M., Wickramasinghe, N. C., Narlikar, J. V., & Rajkumar, R. (2003). New biology of red rain extremophiles prove cometary panspermia. Astrophysics and Space Science, 283(1), 403-408. https://t.co/NvzyVqDbEU

Wickramasinghe, C. (2021). Cometary panspermia: A radical theory of life’s cosmic origin and evolution. Research Features. https://t.co/FNYZEEfUE0

@World_Affairs11 @SolautSonja pipelines in Middle East or far east can be built very fast unlike Germany. 

China dramatically accelerates pipeline construction, often finishing major segments months ahead of schedule, exemplified by the 5,111-km China-Russia Eastern natural gas pipeline reaching Shanghai in late 2024, seven months early. In 2024 alone, over 4,000 kilometers of new oil and gas pipelines were built, strengthening energy supply to 130 million households.

items.title: The funniest thing today is watching those Zoom analysts on various TV channels trying to rationaliz...
items.content:
The funniest thing today is watching those Zoom analysts on various TV channels trying to rationalize what the US would do in the coming days.

Asking the Magic 8-Ball would be more reliable today than any rationalization.

The self-proclaimed leader of the free world with the advertised checks and balances has clearly demonstrated to the world over the past few months what all those checks and balances are worth.
